labels.title: Testing the Addition of an Individualized Vaccine to Durvalumab and Tremelimumab and Chemotherapy in Patients With Metastatic Triple Negative Breast Cancer

labels.reason: Patient has stage III (non-metastatic/non-advanced) TNBC. The trial targets advanced or metastatic solid tumors, and cohorts A1 and C require patients to have received all standard therapies for which they were an appropriate candidate. While the patient has received neoadjuvant chemotherapy, stage III TNBC has additional standard treatment options (e.g., adjuvant capecitabine, olaparib for BRCA1 mutant) and does not clearly qualify as 'advanced or metastatic' disease required for trial enrollment.
labels.title: A Study of LY4052031 in Participants With Advanced or Metastatic Urothelial Cancer or Other Solid Tumors

labels.reason: Patient has HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer (HER2+, ER-), but the trial requires HR+/HER2- breast cancer. The patient fails the primary inclusion criterion on tumor subtype.
labels.title: A Study to Evaluate the Safety and Tolerability of TOS-358 in Women With HR+ HER2- Breast Cancer
